reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
All services lack tidiness in the campsite and in the bathrooms

reviews.comment:
No me gustó la atención de unos de los chicos del servicompras, le pedí la llave del baño de socios y me miró con una cara,como si le uvise dicho que me regalara plata,! Un boludo con todas las letras.!

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like the service from one of the guys at the convenience store. I asked him for the key to the members' bathroom and he looked at me like I'd asked him for money! A complete idiot!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURneDVPM0lnEAE

reviews.comment:
Lindo Camping. Grande y completo... Pero le falta un poco mas de cuidado.

(Translated by Google)
Nice campsite. Large and well-equipped... But it needs a little more maintenance.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar, gran espacio, baños y duchas muy buenos, comodo acceso!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, great space, very good bathrooms and showers, convenient access!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRM2FpMnJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen camping, muy limpio, bien cuidado y tiene una muy buena cancha de fútbol en el interior también pileta, asadores, baño y serca de la costanera y  para completar para los socios del ACA, justo al lado se encuentra una YPF con descuentos para estos socios.

(Translated by Google)
A very nice campsite, very clean, well-maintained, and has a very good indoor soccer field, a swimming pool, grills, a restroom, and is close to the waterfront. And to top it off, for ACA members, there's a YPF (Yearly Birds' Farm) store right next door, offering discounts for these members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNReXNhRDl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Ojo si agarran la ruta hacia Córdoba capital que apenas giras a la ruta hay un puesto de policía ,ir con las luces encendidas y cinturón puesto

(Translated by Google)
Be careful if you take the road to Córdoba capital, as soon as you turn onto the road there is a police station. Drive with your lights on and fasten your seatbelt.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNVpTWUZBEAE
